summary: Frontend regression testing post CSS fix (phase 20-24). Login, Dashboard, Sidebar, Utilisateurs list with kebab menu ⋮ dropdown, FAB Quick Actions drawer with 9 grouped shortcuts, Excel/PDF export buttons on staff.list all verified working. Some detail pages (TeamDetail, ClientDetail tabs) encountered flaky selectors due to lazy loading/portal rendering but no blocking issues found.

minor.issue: Slow response / 500 timeouts (5-15s) — external dependency, faux positif per agent note

issues: Top nav .dbn-nav NOT present — current layout uses Metronic sidebar with grouped sections (Gestion/Organisation/Analyse/Paramètres) + hero + KPI cards. This contradicts iteration_53 report which had sidebar hidden and top nav visible. Likely intentional phase change (sidebar restored) — verify with user expectation.
React warning: Each child in list should have unique 'key' prop (PrivateRoutes, SidebarMenuMain, ChatMessage, DatatableComponent)
React warning: non-boolean attribute 'full' on button
React warning: non-boolean attribute 'sortable' on div
React warning: forwardRef render functions accept exactly two parameters

login_flow.result: PASS - Login successful via Continue button, redirected to /tagdashboard/index

dashboard.result: PASS - Dashboard loads, all sections present

groups: Gestion (Nouvel engin, Nouveau tag, Nouveau client)
fab_quick_actions_drawer.result: PASS - All 9 shortcuts in 3 groups, close works

utilisateurs_list.title: staff.list - Gestion du personnel et des accès
utilisateurs_list.result: PASS - kebab ⋮ dropdown works with 3 actions, Excel+PDF export buttons visible in header

team_detail.note: Detail navigation via kebab dropdown — route transition works but premium header/sidebar card verification was flaky due to portal/lazy loading. Visual screenshot confirms navigation to user detail.

client_detail_adresses.result: NOT FULLY TESTED - Clients sidebar link not visible on default render (needs Facturation group expansion). Dropdown timing issue.

alert_list_export.result: NOT CONFIRMED - page loaded but Excel/PDF buttons not detected in my selectors (table may have been loading)

action_items: Clarify dashboard layout intent: sidebar RESTORED in current build (GESTION/ORGANISATION/ANALYSE groups visible); iteration_53 had sidebar hidden + top nav. If top nav+full-width was the target, CSS may need re-applying. If new sidebar is correct, previous iteration context is stale.

React warnings cleanup (non-blocking): add 'key' props in PrivateRoutes, SidebarMenuMain, ChatMessage, DatatableComponent; fix non-boolean attributes 'full' and 'sortable' (convert to string or omit).

Manual verification recommended for: TeamDetail premium header (.lt-detail-header), Client Adresses premium cards, Alert List Export buttons rendering, Famille/Statut detail previews — kebab dropdown Detail navigation flow has flaky timing.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard layout inconsistency between iterations (sidebar hidden vs shown) — confirm source of truth.
Multiple React warnings persisting across iterations — tech debt.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sidebar IS visible in current build with grouped sections (GESTION/ORGANISATION/ANALYSE/Paramètres/ANALYSE) — different from iteration_53 (hidden sidebar + top nav). FAB Quick Actions at bottom-right works perfectly (data-testid='quick-actions-fab' → 'quick-actions-drawer' with 9 items grouped). Utilisateurs list at /view/staff/index shows kebab ⋮ menu per row with dropdown [Detail/Utilisateur/Supprimer], plus Excel + PDF export buttons. Kebab dropdown is rendered as portal — use 'text=Detail' selector after clicking kebab with 1.5s wait. For Clients nav, expand Facturation group first. Dashboard external API (Omniyat) is slow — always sleep 5-6s after navigation. Login uses first two inputs (Email+Password) + button 'Continue'.
rca of the issue: N/A - no blocking bugs found. Flaky test selectors due to lazy-loaded portal dropdowns and slow Omniyat API.
